title: Copy text from time tracking app to Updates
excerpt: Hello, we use the 7Pace Time Tracker app from the Marketplace. Would there be a way to automatically copy the Comment field of text into the Updates section?

posts.author: gilgamesh (Tyler)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello, we use the 7Pace Time Tracker app from the Marketplace. Would there be a way to automatically copy the Comment field of text into the Updates section?
